text: Come on, Kate, don't keep us in suspense — or are you just waiting for Abadar to lend you a miracle?
Toni, darling, don't let the chips weigh you down—it's just a sprinkle into that pot, not a mortgage on your ship!
Farrah, darling, you gonna let that pitiful stack of cash decide your fate, or are you ready to take a swing?
